title: Welcome Obama
subTitle: Yashoda agrees to be a surrogate mother to Lucy, an American lady. Unfortunately, during her pregnancy, Yashoda meets with an accident that jeopardises the child's life.

title: Chandrakala
subTitle: A family moves into their ancestral mansion to try to sell it off. However, trouble starts brewing when they experience supernatural phenomena and a ghost mysteriously killing people.

title: Masthi Maja
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of some of the funniest comedy scenes from popular Telugu movies is played back to back.

title: Calvary Darsanam
subTitle: Calvary Darsanam

title: Simha
subTitle: A righteous professor rescues a student from the evil clutches of thugs and learns of her plight. After deciding to protect her from harm, he ends up falling in love with her.

title: Gully Rowdy
subTitle: A young man tries to find a balance between his love interest and friends. Meanwhile, his friends convince him to stay rowdy.

title: Baahubali 2: The Conclusion
subTitle: After learning that his father was brutally killed by Bhallaladeva, Mahendra Baahubali raises an army to defeat him and release his mother from the former's captivity.

title: Dhamaka
subTitle: Things get complicated when Swami and Anand, two look-alike men from different backgrounds, fall in love with the same girl.

title: Kuberaa
subTitle: Following a tycoon's discovery of a rare oil reserve, a compassionate beggar gets trapped in the dangerous mechanisms of his rapacious scheme.

title: Balagam
subTitle: A young man in severe debt believes that the only way to pay it off is through the dowry from his impending marriage. However, the death of his grandfather puts his plan on hold.

title: Ayyaare
subTitle: While Venkatesam and Anjali decide to get married, Anjali's father suddenly reverses his decision after seeking the advice of a priest, prompting Venkatesam to find out the reason.

title: Yenthavaadu Gaani
subTitle: An honest police officer works tirelessly to dismantle an organ trafficking racket. However, he is oblivious that the very man he hunts is his beloved's killer.

title: Masthi Maja
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of some of the funniest comedy scenes from popular Telugu movies is played back to back.

title: Calvary Darsanam
subTitle: Calvary Darsanam

title: Raju Gari Gadhi 3
subTitle: Ashwin and Maya, a couple in love, learn of the presence of an evil spirit in their life. Determined to bring their life back to normalcy, Ashwin sets out on a spooky journey to safeguard his love.

title: Adipurush
subTitle: Raghava, the prince of Ayodhya, lives in exile alongside his wife Janaki and brother Shesh. When the king of Lanka kidnaps Janaki, Raghava and his allies set out to rescue her.

title: Bharat Ane Nenu
subTitle: Bharat, a graduate from Oxford, is forced to take up his father's position as the chief minister after his sudden death. He tries to reform the corrupt society but faces obstacles from his enemies.

title: Sir Madam
subTitle: Passion and conflict intertwine in the turbulent relationship of a strong-willed couple, forging an intense emotional bond through their shared journey.

title: Thammudu
subTitle: A brother and a sister share a close bond. Later, when his sister faces multiple challenges in life, he strives to protect her at any cost.

title: Baak
subTitle: Suspicious about his sister's death, Saravanan, a lawyer, tries to solve the mystery behind it, only to discover a mysteriously dark force at play.

title: Saamy 2
subTitle: Ramasamy, who works as a front-end receptionist for Union Minister Viswanathan, decides to pursue civil service. Soon, Viswanathan's daughter falls in love with him after he saves her from gangsters.

title: Okkade
subTitle: A minister assigns Yugandhar, an honest police officer, to find a way to stop gang leader Subbarayudu and his followers who are running a parallel government.

title: Masthi Maja
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of some of the funniest comedy scenes from popular Telugu movies is played back to back.

title: Calvary Darsanam
subTitle: Calvary Darsanam

title: Mathu Vadalara
subTitle: Babu and Yesu are two delivery agents who decide to adopt unlawful methods to make quick money. However, Babu ends up killing an old lady and lands in trouble.

title: Love Story
subTitle: A Christian Zumba instructor falls for a starry-eyed upper caste Hindu girl. In their quest for happiness, they must first overcome a massive caste divide.

title: Skanda
subTitle: A skilled martial artist's life changes when a secret agency recruits him to stop terrorists. He faces a dangerous mission that will test his abilities and courage beyond anything he is known.

title: RX 100
subTitle: Shiva has a passionate affair with Indu, a politician's daughter from the city. However, when they get separated, he becomes angry and prone to extreme violence.

title: Krack
subTitle: Three delinquents attempt to outwit a resolute police officer, underestimating his clever methods and unwavering dedication to law enforcement.

title: Sita
subTitle: Ram, a young boy, lives in a monastery waiting for Sita to return and take care of him. However, Sita returns, years later, but with an ulterior motive.
